title: Slow execution of COUNT in combination with DISTINCT
poc:
With 10M rows a query posed like this:
 SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT(predicate)) from facts;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT(predicate) from facts) AS b;
key_bug_features: COUNT with DISTINCT on large datasets
bug_features_seed: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT(predicate) FROM "sys"."facts" WHERE object IS NOT NULL) AS b;
